data.body:
4214 CI/review remediation: full make test caught a REAL regression (my verify-opcert intercept broke test_gen_cli_reference x9 — INTERCEPT_COMMANDS out of sync). Fixed: added verify-opcert to scripts/gen_cli_reference.py INTERCEPT_COMMANDS + test _LADDER + regenerated docs/cli-reference.md. Also 664 LLM-Review -1 = REAL security finding: compacted close-STATUS -> anchor None -> ticket dropped = FAIL-OPEN. Fixed: don't drop; leave close_commit=None -> _is_enforced(None) fails closed (documented+tested contract). Did NOT add a regression test (forcing compact() to fold the terminal STATUS is env-dependent -> would be vacuous/flaky; removed it, documented why). Amended + re-pushed 664 (both fixes). 
649 Verified -1 = FLAKE (test_config_perf timing 0.586>0.5; py3.12+macOS passed) -> posted recheck.
ee0b r2 -> 2 BLOCKs (ssh-keygen>=8.9 compute env; HTTP handler schema). Remediated: container image w/ OpenSSH>=8.9; handler contract {ticket_id,kind,commit}->{verdict,envelope,...}. r3 running b5luwzle1. Amended-664 make test running bujfk3e0a.
